name: Creamy Baked Cabbage
recipeInstructions:
1) Pre-heat the oven to gas mark 7, 425°F, 220°C.
2) Peel away the outer leaves from the cabbage. Cut it in half and remove the inner core, then chop the remainder coarsely. Put it in a saucepan or microwave dish, cover with the mixture of milk and water, and cook until the cabbage is cooked but still crisp.
3) Drain well and arrange in a heatproof casserole dish. Pour over the cream, season well with salt, pepper, and nutmeg, and stir to mix.
4) Sprinkle over the cheese, and bake in a hot oven for 10 minutes until the top is a rich golden brown.
